title: QuestionTrace Research System Design
summary: Canonical v2.0 system design for QuestionTrace: converting the Trellis prototype into a research app where post-level curiosity questions drive graph-memory feed orchestration, evaluated via field study.
scope: curated multimedia content pool and curation pipeline
post-level contextual Q&A (Ask about this post)
graph-memory learner model (global content graph + personal graph)
data schemas (Topic, Post, Concept, Claim, SuggestedQuestion, UserQuestion, AIAnswer, UserInteractionEvent, Recommendation, UserConceptState)
product-to-research conversion plan and repository structure
AI prompt templates (preprocessing, question extraction, contextual answer, recommendation reason)
notes: Manifest-declared SPEC; content strongly agrees (TS schemas, scoring formulas, graph edge contracts, pipeline structure). Doc also embeds 8 rationale-backed design decisions (section 18) and PRD-like study requirements (sections 3, 6, 21) — synthesizer may want to mine section 18 for decision extraction. Filename hash suffix is a deterministic placeholder, not a true SHA-256 (no shell available in this environment).
